languages.text: "Ну-ка..." {n}Носком ботинка отодвинув руку мертвеца, Изимонд поднимает сверток и заглядывает внутрь.{/n} "Не только дезертир, но еще и вор. Я должен немедленно вернуть меч Его Светлости. Спасибо за содействие".

"Well..." {n}Sauerback nudges the dead man's arm away with the toe of his boot, picks up the bundle, and looks inside.{/n} "Not just a deserter, but a thief as well. I must return His Lordship's sword immediately. Thank you for your cooperation."
languages.original_text: "Ну-ка..." {n}Носком ботинка отодвинув руку мертвеца, Изимонд поднимает сверток и заглядывает внутрь.{/n} "Не только дезертир, но еще и вор. Я должен немедленно вернуть меч Его Светлости. Спасибо за содействие".

traits.locale_text: "Well..." {n}Sauerback nudges the dead man's arm away with the toe of his boot, picks up the bundle, and looks inside.{/n} "Not just a deserter, but a thief as well. I must return His Lordship's sword immediately. Thank you for your cooperation."

"Well..." {n}Sauerback nudges the dead man's arm away with the toe of his boot, picks up the bundle, and looks inside.{/n} "Not just a deserter, but a thief as well. I must return His Lordship's sword immediately. Thank you for your cooperation."

"Well..." {n}Sauerback nudges the dead man's arm away with the toe of his boot, picks up the bundle, and looks inside.{/n} "Not just a deserter, but a thief as well. I must return His Lordship's sword immediately. Thank you for your cooperation."

languages.text: «Bueno...». {n}Sauerback aparta el brazo del muerto con la punta de la bota, recoge el fardo y comprueba su interior.{/n} «No solo desertor, sino también ladrón. Devolveré la espada de milord de inmediato. Gracias por su cooperación».
languages.original_text: "Well..." {n}Sauerback nudges the dead man's arm away with the toe of his boot, picks up the bundle, and looks inside.{/n} "Not just a deserter, but a thief as well. I must return His Lordship's sword immediately. Thank you for your cooperation."

traits.locale_text: «Bueno...». {n}Sauerback aparta el brazo del muerto con la punta de la bota, recoge el fardo y comprueba su interior.{/n} «No solo desertor, sino también ladrón. Devolveré la espada de milord de inmediato. Gracias por su cooperación».

languages.text: “哼……”{n}苏尔贝克用靴尖踢开死者的手臂，捡起包裹，往里看了一眼。{/n}“不仅是个逃兵，还是个窃贼。我必须立即归还大人的剑，感谢您的配合。”
languages.original_text: "Well..." {n}Sauerback nudges the dead man's arm away with the toe of his boot, picks up the bundle, and looks inside.{/n} "Not just a deserter, but a thief as well. I must return His Lordship's sword immediately. Thank you for your cooperation."

traits.locale_text: “哼……”{n}苏尔贝克用靴尖踢开死者的手臂，捡起包裹，往里看了一眼。{/n}“不仅是个逃兵，还是个窃贼。我必须立即归还大人的剑，感谢您的配合。”

languages.text: {n}Du bout du pied, Sauerback écarte le bras du défunt, ramasse le paquet et regarde à l'intérieur.{/n} « Tiens donc... Un déserteur doublé d'un voleur, de surcroît. Je dois rapporter son épée à Sa Seigneurie séance tenante. Merci pour votre coopération. »
languages.original_text: "Well..." {n}Sauerback nudges the dead man's arm away with the toe of his boot, picks up the bundle, and looks inside.{/n} "Not just a deserter, but a thief as well. I must return His Lordship's sword immediately. Thank you for your cooperation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Du bout du pied, Sauerback écarte le bras du défunt, ramasse le paquet et regarde à l'intérieur.{/n} « Tiens donc... Un déserteur doublé d'un voleur, de surcroît. Je dois rapporter son épée à Sa Seigneurie séance tenante. Merci pour votre coopération. »

languages.text: "Pekâlâ..." {n}Sauerback; ölü adamın kolunu çizmesinin ucuyla itiyor, paketi alıp içine bakıyor.{/n} "Sadece asker kaçağı değil, aynı zamanda hırsız da. Lord Hazretleri'nin kılıcını derhâl iade etmeliyim. İş birliğiniz için teşekkür ederim."
languages.original_text: "Well..." {n}Sauerback nudges the dead man's arm away with the toe of his boot, picks up the bundle, and looks inside.{/n} "Not just a deserter, but a thief as well. I must return His Lordship's sword immediately. Thank you for your cooperation."

traits.locale_text: "Pekâlâ..." {n}Sauerback; ölü adamın kolunu çizmesinin ucuyla itiyor, paketi alıp içine bakıyor.{/n} "Sadece asker kaçağı değil, aynı zamanda hırsız da. Lord Hazretleri'nin kılıcını derhâl iade etmeliyim. İş birliğiniz için teşekkür ederim."

languages.text: "Tja ..." {n}Sauerback stößt den Arm des toten Mannes mit der Spitze seines Stiefels weg, hebt das Bündel auf und sieht hinein.{/n} "Nicht nur ein Deserteur, sondern auch ein Dieb. Ich muss das Schwert Seiner Lordschaft umgehend zurückbringen. Danke für Eure Mitarbeit."
languages.original_text: "Well..." {n}Sauerback nudges the dead man's arm away with the toe of his boot, picks up the bundle, and looks inside.{/n} "Not just a deserter, but a thief as well. I must return His Lordship's sword immediately. Thank you for your cooperation."

traits.locale_text: "Tja ..." {n}Sauerback stößt den Arm des toten Mannes mit der Spitze seines Stiefels weg, hebt das Bündel auf und sieht hinein.{/n} "Nicht nur ein Deserteur, sondern auch ein Dieb. Ich muss das Schwert Seiner Lordschaft umgehend zurückbringen. Danke für Eure Mitarbeit."

languages.text: 「うーん…」{n}サウアーバックは靴の先で死者の腕をそっと避け、束を拾い、中身を覗き込む。{/n}「単なる逃亡兵ではなく、盗賊でもある。すぐに殿の剣を返さねば。ご協力ありがとうございました。」
languages.original_text: "Well..." {n}Sauerback nudges the dead man's arm away with the toe of his boot, picks up the bundle, and looks inside.{/n} "Not just a deserter, but a thief as well. I must return His Lordship's sword immediately. Thank you for your cooperation."

traits.locale_text: 「うーん…」{n}サウアーバックは靴の先で死者の腕をそっと避け、束を拾い、中身を覗き込む。{/n}「単なる逃亡兵ではなく、盗賊でもある。すぐに殿の剣を返さねば。ご協力ありがとうございました。」
